summary.finance: KOSPI surges on hopes of Middle East conflict de-escalation; tech leaders Samsung and SK Hynix see significant gains.
summary.art: Art market vibrant with BAMA 2026 and Art OnO 2026 both kicking off in Seoul/Busan.

market_highlights: KOSPI rallies as Middle East tensions show signs of de-escalation, surging 6.57%.
Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix lead market gains, rising 9.99% and 8.8% respectively.
Investors optimistic following better-than-expected Korean inflation data.
art_highlights: BAMA (Busan Annual Market of Art) 2026 opens today at BEXCO (April 2-5).
Art OnO 2026 runs in Seoul (April 2-5), with VIP preview today.
